'''Brant Rumble''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] on the [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] circuit. Rumble's small stature and [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] enhancements made him a formidable racer during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. His contemporary and competitor [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] once stole and damaged Rumble's podracer to recover [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla's]] stolen [[Ghostling]] children, but the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] paid for the repairs without worry.

{{Char-stub}}
